title: Starter Shelter
description: Offers players a cozy, fully-equipped starter home upon first spawn, complete with essential tools, resources, and a safe haven to kickstart their adventure in style! Perfect for a seamless and exciting survival experience!
body:
![Inside a starter shelter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68faabdc840b4a20246b5bed69595ccedf70aa52.png)

The **Starter Shelter Mod** provides players with a **pre-built starter house upon their first spawn** in the world. 

The house includes essential utilities such as a crafting table, furnace, bed, chest, and torches for lighting, offering a safe and convenient space to begin their survival journey. 

The chest is stocked with a variety of starter items, including tools, food, seeds, and other resources, ensuring players are well-prepared for exploration and crafting right from the start.

![Random content of the starter shelter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de9b22c07c14f59e8a3e2049d912df5657252ec3.png)

A map with the surrouding of your starter shelter is included!

![A map with the surrouding of your starter shelter is included!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de58d48b9e6e8e955594be19d8f2e422182b4576.png)

This mod aims to make the very early game experience a bit faster, smoother and more enjoyable!

![A starter shelter from outside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db3b57b7c8389312ca818846e55baed29b7f5b02.png)

The starter shelter has a new skin for each type of biome!

![Snow biome starter shelter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02eb95c03e6974f98b6f26b537135acd7b61bdca_0.webp)
